nodes.name: Build Router Command
nodes.notes: Receives either a normalized odin intake enqueue envelope or an approval-resolve request, and is the only workflow that knows the pilot SSH target. It intentionally uses a dedicated odin_os_ingress key so non-cutover legacy workflows can keep using odin_ingress.

nodes.name: SSH to Odin OS Router
nodes.notes: Empty SSH_ORIGINAL_COMMAND streams the normalized intake envelope to odin intake enqueue. approval-resolve requests become forced-command SSH invocations over the dedicated odin_os_ingress pilot key.

meta.description: Shared Odin OS transport. Normalizes stdin routing to odin intake enqueue and translates approval-resolve requests for the SSH forced-command router. This workflow uses a dedicated odin_os_ingress pilot key so legacy workflows can keep their existing shared ingress key during staged cutover.
